scripts.wasm:build: CARGO_TARGET_WASM32_UNKNOWN_UNKNOWN_LINKER=wasm-ld cargo build --manifest-path ../Cargo.toml --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && mkdir -p public/wasm && cp ../target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/handwriting_core.wasm public/wasm/handwriting_core.wasm
scripts.predev: npm run datasets:build && npm run wasm:build
scripts.prebuild: npm run datasets:build && npm run wasm:build
